name: Alex Chen
subject: Speaking Opportunity
message: Hi Abdullah, we'd love to have you speak at our annual security conference in March 2025. Would you be available?

name: Sarah Mitchell
subject: Consulting Inquiry
message: We are looking for a penetration testing expert for our fintech platform. Could we schedule a call to discuss?

name: Omar Farouq
subject: Mentorship Request
message: I'm a cybersecurity student and a huge fan of your work. Would you consider taking me on as a mentee?
